overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character traversing a dystopian industrial district. The journey moves from an elevated covered market walkway, descends through exterior stairwells and pipes, continues through graffiti-covered ground-level alleys, and ends in a dark enclosed corridor with dramatic overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered market walkway with food stalls

events.description: entering covered market walkway from open elevated platform
moving deeper into covered area illuminated by yellow neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through elevated covered market walkway, passing food stalls and seated patrons on both sides

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind stall counter preparing items
patron sitting at round table eating and drinking

entered.detail: corrugated metal roof structure covering the elevated pedestrian walkway
rows of yellow fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling
food vendor stall with cooking equipment and blue signage
yellow painted metal railings along the edges of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated industrial walkway with yellow safety railings. The player enters a covered market area with a metal roof and yellow neon lighting. Food stalls line the right side where a vendor works, while patrons sit at tables on the left eating and drinking.

events.description: exiting covered market into open industrial exterior with large ventilation pipes
beginning rapid descent down metal staircase with yellow railings

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered market area and rapidly descending industrial metal staircases between building structures

entered.detail: large silver ventilation pipes running horizontally along building exterior
rusted metal stairs with yellow safety railings descending between structures
large circular ventilation fans mounted on building walls

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered market into bright sunlight, revealing an industrial exterior with large ventilation pipes and fans. The camera descends rapidly down metal staircases with yellow railings, moving between tall building structures with no other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level industrial back alley with graffiti

events.description: reaching ground level and entering narrow alley between industrial buildings
passing seated individuals resting against graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking through ground-level industrial alley, navigating around debris and passing individuals seated against walls

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on mat against wall with belongings

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large industrial storage tanks with metal ladders attached
scattered trash, wooden pallets, and abandoned materials
external fire escape stairs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Having reached ground level, the player moves through a gritty industrial alley with graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. Large cylindrical tanks and external fire escapes line the path, while a few individuals sit against the walls resting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley approaching GOLIATH structure

events.description: entering darker covered section of alley with overhead industrial bridge
passing under large GOLIATH signage into increasingly dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through narrowing alley toward large industrial structure, passing other pedestrians moving in opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person walking toward camera through the narrow passage

entered.detail: large industrial sign with GOLIATH text hanging over alley entrance
metal bridge structure connecting buildings overhead with pipes and cables
illuminated vertical light fixtures mounted on wall surfaces
basketball hoop attached to wall with backboard

segments.scene_description: The alley narrows as the player approaches a large industrial structure marked with GOLIATH signage hanging overhead. The environment becomes more enclosed with an overhead walkway bridge, vertical light strips, and a basketball hoop visible. Other pedestrians walk toward the camera as the lighting grows darker.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark enclosed industrial corridor with overhead light shafts

events.description: entering dark corridor with dramatic beams of sunlight penetrating from above
bright light flare from overhead temporarily obscures view of approaching figure

agents.ego_description: walking through dark industrial corridor with dramatic light shafts, approaching a figure silhouetted in the light

notable_agents.action: person walking toward camera through bright light beam ahead

entered.detail: dramatic beams of sunlight penetrating through gaps in overhead industrial structure
large green metal shipping container or industrial storage box

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dark enclosed industrial corridor where dramatic beams of sunlight pierce through gaps overhead. A green metal container sits to the left as the player approaches a figure walking toward them through the bright light, creating a silhouetted effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that descends from a vibrant elevated market into the dark, oppressive depths of an industrial corridor. It begins on a high walkway with yellow safety railings, moving through a covered market filled with neon lighting, food stalls, and dining patrons. As the camera exits the market into bright sunlight, the scene shifts to a rapid descent down metal staircases flanked by massive ventilation pipes and fans. The movement then transitions to ground level, weaving through a gritty, graffiti-covered alley lined with cylindrical tanks and resting figures before narrowing under a GOLIATH sign and an overhead bridge. Finally, the environment closes in as the camera enters a dark industrial corridor where dramatic beams of sunlight pierce the ceiling, silhouetting a figure walking toward the viewer past a green metal container.
